expect: M1-M4 map cleanly to symmetry operations: M1+M3 are Goldstone-mode rotators (cheap domain rebalancing), M4 is massive-mode energy injection (only mechanism for locked-in breaks). Prediction: M4 cadence determines equilibrium asymmetry.
actual: Mapping confirmed. M1 (linkage 2.7→37.1%) and M3 (historian routing) rotate domain symmetry Goldstone mode — direction of dominance is arbitrary, rotation is cheap. M4 (14.3x closure multiplier) injects energy into massive modes (confirmation lock 54:1, level collapse 78% L2, external closure 97.4%). M2 (enforcement gate) prevents L-601 decay. S452 falsification is now explained: M1+M3 cannot close because Goldstone rotation improves linkage not closure. M4 is necessary because global resolution IS a massive-mode operation.
diff: Mapping cleaner than expected. Unexpected: M2 (enforcement) is the decay-prevention mechanism (L-601 instance), not a symmetry operator. Also unexpected: attention carrying capacity (ISO-27, L-1121) is the conserved charge — symmetry breaks redirect it, and M1-M4 are attention redistribution mechanisms at the frontier level.

predictions.claim: M1+M3 alone (Goldstone operators) cannot produce >0.24/session global resolution rate
predictions.test: 20 sessions with only M1+M3 active, M4 suppressed. Resolution rate.
predictions.evidence: S441-S452 (12 sessions, M1+M3 active, M4 absent): 0.00 strict rate. CONSISTENT.

predictions.claim: M4 effectiveness depends on M1 linkage — unlinked domains get <2x closure rate
predictions.test: Compare M4 closure rates on linked (>20% linkage) vs unlinked (<10%) domain frontiers
predictions.evidence: Preliminary: F-LEVEL1 (well-linked) closed at 1.0/session. F-COMP1 (0 linkage, 0 resolution in 389 sessions) is the control case.

predictions.claim: At N>1500, M1-M4 insufficient without loop-entry attention enforcement (L-1118)
predictions.test: Track attention/lesson ratio and symmetry metrics at N=1500 waypoint

method: Theoretical synthesis of L-1124 (8 symmetries, Goldstone/Higgs physics) with F-NK6 empirical 4-mechanism model (S415-S458 trajectory). Mapped each mechanism to symmetry operation class. Cross-validated with S452 falsification and S458 M4 discovery.
